task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server as super-admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server dashboard or interface, with indicators of being logged in (e.g., 'super-admin' profile visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the 'Engineering Basics' Exam Configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server UI displays the configuration details or settings page specifically titled 'Engineering Basics'.

task_completion.description: Select the manual network proxy option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Network or Proxy settings section of the configuration, a radio button, checkbox, or dropdown is set to 'Manual' proxy configuration.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct proxy host and port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text field for Proxy Host contains 'cache.engineering.edu' and the text field for Proxy Port contains '8080'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct proxy bypass list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text field for Proxy Bypass (or Exceptions) contains exactly 'localhost; 10.0.0.*'.
A 'Save' button is being clicked, a success message/toast indicating the configuration was saved is visible, or the final screen shows the saved state of the proxy settings.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Chrome, Firefox, etc.) is used to navigate the SEB Server UI. There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands or API scripts used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The proxy settings were entered into the actual SEB Server configuration form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields for host, port, and bypass are part of the SEB Server web interface, not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the frontend UI to make changes rather than modifying the backend directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like sqlite3, pgAdmin) are open showing direct database edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected proxy configuration values to verify in the SEB Server UI are: Host: 'cache.engineering.edu', Port: '8080', Bypass list: 'localhost; 10.0.0.*'.
